title: Gun and Boss
description: Weapons and a new miniboss in minecraft
body: Hey, everybody. I present to your attention a new mod. Now in your world will be generated a new flower - arrow. The chance of generation is rare, but it is compensated by its loot. If you break it, it will drop 20 arrows, if you click on it with the right mouse button (or other key responsible for the use of items), you will get 5 units of experience. But what is it useful for? Now there is skraft weapons in minecraft. Quite a high rate of fire and accuracy. For shooting, arrows are used. You will also be able to create a new miniboss - Skeletron. If you kill him will fall out multitool, capable of breaking any blocks. For mod requires version of minecraft 1,20,1, and version forge for the same version. In the mod used some textures from other modifications. except fordzha install anything is not necessary.
